items.headline: US Stock Futures Edge Higher, Extending Record Rally on AI Optimism and Geopolitical Hopes
items.summary: US stock futures are showing slight gains this morning, building on yesterday's record-setting rally. Investor sentiment remains cautiously optimistic, driven by continued strong demand for artificial intelligence (AI) computing and hopes for easing global tensions between the US and Iran. While technology stocks lead the charge, concerns about inflation and the sustainability of the extended AI rally persist.

items.headline: Dell Technologies Surges on Blockbuster Earnings
items.summary: Dell Technologies ($DELL) soared in pre-market trading after reporting first-quarter earnings that exceeded market expectations and raising its full-year outlook, primarily driven by strong demand for AI computing.

items.headline: NetApp Rises on Strong Q4 Results
items.summary: NetApp Inc ($NTAP) saw significant pre-market gains following strong fiscal fourth-quarter results and an uplifted forecast for the upcoming quarter and full year.

items.headline: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Gains
items.summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise ($HPE) showed strong pre-market movement.

items.headline: Autodesk Slips Despite Earnings Beat
items.summary: Autodesk Inc ($ADSK) experienced a pre-market decline despite reporting earnings that surpassed expectations, potentially due to guidance or profit-taking.

items.headline: American Eagle Outfitters Falls on Weak Forecast
items.summary: American Eagle Outfitters Inc ($AEO) dropped in pre-market trading after lowering its current-quarter forecast, despite beating first-quarter earnings and revenue expectations. Comparable sales also declined.

items.headline: EchoStar Corp Experiences Pre-Market Dip
items.summary: EchoStar Corp ($SATS) saw a decrease in pre-market activity.

items.headline: Technology Sector Continues to Drive Market Rally
items.summary: The technology sector remains a primary driver of market strength, fueled by ongoing robust demand for artificial intelligence infrastructure and related services. Companies involved in AI computing are seeing significant gains.

items.headline: Hopes for US-Iran Ceasefire Boost Investor Confidence
items.summary: Investor sentiment is benefiting from reports indicating progress in US-Iran ceasefire negotiations, which are helping to ease geopolitical tensions and reduce pressure on energy markets.

items.headline: Cooling Oil Prices Alleviate Inflation Concerns
items.summary: Brent crude dipped to $92.10 a barrel and US benchmark crude declined to $87.55 a barrel. Lower oil prices are contributing to eased inflation concerns among investors.

items.headline: Key Economic Data and Fed Speeches on Today's Calendar
items.summary: Today's economic calendar includes speeches from FOMC members Kashkari, Schmid, Bowman, and Daly. Additionally, Retail Inventories and Wholesale Inventories data are due at 8:30 AM ET, followed by the Chicago PMI at 9:45 AM ET. The Baker Hughes Rig Count will be released at 1:00 PM ET, and Farm Prices at 3:00 PM ET.

items.headline: Broadcom Downgraded Amid Broader Chip Sector Caution
items.summary: Broadcom ($AVGO) was downgraded to a 'Hold' rating by Wall Street Zen. This comes amidst some caution within the broader chip sector, with some analysts suggesting the AI/silicon rally may be becoming extended.

items.headline: Costco Misses on Bottom Line, Shares Decline
items.summary: Costco Holdings ($COST) shares fell after the company reported fiscal third-quarter earnings per share that missed analyst estimates, despite revenue exceeding projections.

items.headline: 'Sell in May' Theme Disregarded as Indices Post Strong Gains
items.summary: The traditional 'Sell in May and go away' adage has been set aside this year, with major indices showing significant gains as the month concludes.
